subcodes.first_line: Say: O companion! All services and affairs return unto the word "nay" and "yea" that shineth forth from the Dayspring of the tongue of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو ای انیس جمیع خدمتها و امور راجع بکلمه لا و نعمی است که از مطلع لسان رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
